title: Blend Mode Effects
description: Use CSS blend modes to create layered visual effects with overlapping gradient backgrounds
html: Blended

validationRules.message: Layer 2 should use multiply blend mode

hints.text: mix-blend-mode controls how an element's colors blend with the content behind it. 'multiply' darkens by multiplying color values.
Stack two absolutely positioned layers. Apply 'mix-blend-mode: multiply' to the second layer. Position the label with z-index above both.
Layer 2 gets mix-blend-mode: multiply. Both layers use position: absolute with inset: 0.
